title: Puerto Banus Catamaran Hire by the Hour in 2026
html:
Puerto Banus, the glamorous marina on the Costa del Sol, is an ideal departure point for hourly catamaran hire, with prices starting from around 450 EUR for a three-hour charter. BoatHire24 connects you directly with verified operators offering flexible bookings.

How much does it cost to rent a catamaran by the hour in Puerto Banus?

Hourly catamaran hire in Puerto Banus typically ranges from 150 EUR to 300 EUR per hour for a bareboat or skippered charter. Prices vary by vessel size, season, and crew services. For a three-hour sunset cruise on a 40ft Lagoon, expect to pay around 600 EUR. The primary link to browse options is on the yacht charter in Puerto Banus page, which lists current availability and special offers.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most hourly catamaran charters depart from the main Puerto Banus marina, located in the heart of Marbella's Golden Mile. Nearby departure points include the real Puerto Banus port, the Le Club area, and San Pedro de Alcantara. For longer trips, boats often sail towards the Bay of Marbella, stop at the Cabo Pino inlet, or anchor off the coast of Estepona. The nearby island of Isla de las Palomas is a popular snorkelling spot.

Which boat to rent for an hourly charter

  1. 40ft Lagoon catamaran, ideal for family groups, up to 12 guests, from 250 EUR per hour.
  2. Axopar 37 T-Top, best for a fast day trip with 8 guests, from 200 EUR per hour.
  3. Astondoa 55 Flybridge, perfect for luxury entertaining, up to 14 guests, from 400 EUR per hour.
  4. Fairline Phantom 40, suited for couples or small groups, up to 8 guests, from 180 EUR per hour.
  5. Shibuli Leopard 40, a popular catamaran with spacious deck, see the Shibuli charter page for full details and booking.

What licence do I need to drive a catamaran in Puerto Banus?

If you wish to skipper the boat yourself, you typically need a Spanish recreational licence or an ICC (International Certificate of Competence). For hourly hire with a skipper, no licence is required. The operator will confirm exact requirements based on the vessel size and your nationality. During the high season (June to August) and with the Poniente wind, it is wise to book a crewed charter for safety and comfort.

A local tip from one Puerto Banus operator: the best time for an hourly catamaran trip is late afternoon, when the sea breeze drops and you can anchor in the lee of Cabo Pino to watch the sunset over the Sierra Blanca mountains.

Costs and price bands for hourly boat hire in Puerto Banus

  • Shared sunset tour on a catamaran: from 90 EUR per person.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours, unskippered): from 300 EUR.
  • Catamaran full-day crewed charter (8 hours): from 900 EUR.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (Sunseeker 60ft) per hour: from 500 EUR.

At a glance

  • Price band: 150, 400 EUR per hour / 450, 1200 EUR per half-day
  • Peak months: June, July, August
  • Trip length: 3 hours, half-day, or full-day
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests on catamarans
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I rent a catamaran for just one hour in Puerto Banus?

Most operators require a minimum of three hours, but some offer two-hour trips during off-peak times; check individual listings on BoatHire24.

Is it possible to rent a catamaran without a skipper in Spain?

Yes, provided you hold a valid Spanish or international recreational licence; otherwise, a skipper is mandatory and is often included in the hourly rate.

What is the distance from Puerto Banus to Marbella bay by boat?

The distance from Puerto Banus marina to the centre of Marbella bay is approximately 5 nautical miles, a 20-minute cruise at displacement speed.

Do I need to pay a deposit for an hourly charter?

A refundable deposit of 500, 1000 EUR is typically required, depending on the boat value and operator policy.

To reserve your hourly catamaran in Puerto Banus, browse the BoatHire24 marketplace for real-time availability and customer reviews. Boat owners can also list their vessel to earn income from the growing demand for short-term charters in 2026. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.'
